title: Read-only cached entity iterator
prompt:
In Garry's Mod Lua, a common approach first copies every entity with ents.GetAll(). Write a version that visits entities directly without building that copy, and does not modify the collection while iterating. Call use(ent) for each entity where wanted(ent) is true.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.
